name: HVM Wired Miniature Ball Valve
desc: Compact wired remote-control miniature ball valve for small-scale control systems.
overview: The HVM Wired miniature electric ball valve is designed for small-scale fluid control in smart homes, HVAC fan coil units and light industrial applications. RS485 / Modbus communication. 100,000-cycle rated. Compact brass body for tight installation spaces.

specs.label: Nominal diameter
specs.value: DN8 / DN15 / DN20 / DN25 / DN32 / DN40

features: Wired transmission: stable, high anti-interference performance
Low power consumption: simple circuit structure with low maintenance cost; supports quick-connect option
RS485 Modbus communication protocol for direct BMS or PLC integration
Precision metal gear: compact size, open/close at any angle 0–100%, accuracy ±1%
Rated for 100,000 open/close cycles — outlasts most HVAC systems
